ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total population of the demographic group */,
  "prop_wom" REAL /* Proportion of women in the demographic group */,
  "prop_men" REAL /* Proportion of men in the demographic group */,
  "prop_unknown" REAL /* Proportion of unknown genders in the demographic group */,
  "cvap" INTEGER /* Citizen Voting Age Population (CVAP) */,
  "white_pct" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is white */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the county data was inserted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the county data was last updated */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the county */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the county */,
  "ethnic_diversity_index" REAL /* Ethnic diversity index of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_fips FOREIGN KEY ("state_fips") REFERENCES states ("state_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_rural_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the urban/rural classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the classification */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the classification */,
  "classification_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county this demographic data belongs to */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender category (e.g., Male, Female, Unknown) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the demographic data */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the demographic data */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the demographic data */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the demographic data */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of the population in this demographic category */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the total population */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic data was inserted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_urban_rural" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the urban/rural classification */,
  "classification_year" INTEGER /* Year when the county was classified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping data was inserted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_urban_rural_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES urban_rural_classifications ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_urban_rural_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was inserted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
